arts.ttl: Fabregas draws Inspiration from Simone Inzaghi and Thiago Motta
arts.sum: Cesc Fabregas, the former Barcelona and Arsenal midfielder now managing Como in Serie A, has opened up about his early experiences as a coach and the managers who inspire him. In an exclusive interview with SportMediaset, Fabregas reflected on his coaching journey and shared his thoughts on the current Serie A title race. “I’m at the beginning of my coaching career. I feel good, but I still have a lot to learn,” Fabregas admitted. arts.ttl: Baroni optimistic as Lazio prepare for Juventus clash
arts.sum: Lazio manager Marco Baroni expressed confidence in his squad’s readiness for their upcoming Serie A match against Juventus. Speaking at the pre-match press conference, Baroni provided updates on player fitness and shared his thoughts on the challenge ahead. “The team is doing well,” Baroni began. “Today we had our first full training session, as the players who had the satisfaction of joining their national teams have also returned. We’re facing a strong team with the best defense in Europe and the best ball possession in Italy.
